description_long: This object is a large, futuristic, turret-mounted rifle with a robust, angular base and a long, reinforced barrel. The base is hexagonal and heavily armored, featuring metallic gray panels with orange and black accent lines, suggesting a military or security application. The rifle's body is blocky and mechanical, with visible bolts, seams, and structural reinforcements, giving it an industrial appearance. The barrel is elongated and segmented, with several protruding fins or rails along its length, possibly for heat dissipation or structural support. The rear section is bulky, housing what appears to be a power or ammunition module, and the overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing durability and function. The color palette is dominated by shades of gray, with subtle orange highlights and dark metallic details.
description: A large, turret-mounted, futuristic rifle with a hexagonal armored base, long reinforced barrel, and industrial gray and orange color scheme. The design is robust, angular, and heavily mechanical.
description_view_0: Front view shows the hexagonal base, central barrel, and symmetrical armored panels.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated barrel, segmented rails, and bulky rear housing.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the base and the alignment of the barrel and support structures.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the barrel length and structural details.
